title: GE/P-017: ORCHESTRATION.md - note taxonomy (U2), pre-gate explainer+quiz (U4), verifier rotation (F6)
description: Owned file: ORCHESTRATION.md ONLY. Three additive rules, minimal diff: (1) U2 note taxonomy: task notes SHOULD be prefixed DECISION: / DEVIATION: / TRADEOFF: / OPEN-QUESTION: (Thariq implementation-notes categories); evolution audits count and chase OPEN-QUESTION notes mechanically. Add to the lifecycle/notes guidance (section 2 area). (2) U4 pre-gate ritual: before any heavyweight human gate (first git push, first notify activation), the epic join MUST produce an explainer artifact + 3 comprehension questions for the human; the gate request cites them. Add near the human-gates invariant (section 3). (3) F6 verifier rotation: no single reviewer identity may be the sole approver of an entire epic; epic joins and guardrail changes get a rotated or second reviewer with a distinct lens. Add to section 4 (roles). Acceptance: grep -c OPEN-QUESTION ORCHESTRATION.md > 0; three rules present; diff is additions + minimal contextual edits only; existing invariants/lifecycle/tables unchanged; markdown renders.

notes.note: plan: three additive rules into ORCHESTRATION.md only -- U2 note taxonomy appended to end of section 2 (lifecycle), U4 pre-gate explainer+quiz appended to end of section 3 (invariants table row + para), F6 verifier rotation appended to end of section 4 (roles); minimal diff, no renumbering, no table restructuring, cite audit_gen3.md + explainer.html#unknowns + mdtoc T-021..T-029 harness-verifier monoculture as evidence

DECISION: placed each rule as an unnumbered bold-lead paragraph immediately after the existing table it extends (U2 after §2 lifecycle table, U4 after §3 invariants table, F6 after the Roles/Coordinator para in §4, before 'The bench') rather than adding new ## or ### headers, per the minimal-diff / no-renumber constraint. DECISION: used the audit's own citation style (backticked file:line anchors) so the rules read as native to the doc, not bolted on. EXPECTED vs ACTUAL: expected git diff to show only additions -- confirmed (git diff --stat: 28 insertions(+), 0 deletions(-), 0 files changed besides ORCHESTRATION.md). OPEN-QUESTION: none outstanding for this task; F6's own wording cites the mdtoc T-021..T-029 single-reviewer (harness-verifier) precedent as the monoculture example the rule forecloses -- self-referential proof the taxonomy/rule works as intended.

HANDOFF -> verifier: Replay: (1) grep -c OPEN-QUESTION ORCHESTRATION.md -> 2 (>0, taxonomy table + prose reference both hit); (2) grep -n 'U2)|U4)|F6)' ORCHESTRATION.md -> lines 58,84,98 confirm all three rules present verbatim; (3) grep -n '^## ' ORCHESTRATION.md -> sections 1..7 unchanged, no renumbering; (4) git diff --stat ORCHESTRATION.md -> 1 file changed, 28 insertions(+), 0 deletions(-) -- pure additions, existing tables/prose byte-identical (git diff ORCHESTRATION.md shows only '+' hunks); (5) markdown structure verified by Read -- new content is bold-lead paragraphs + one new 2-col table (U2), inserted directly after the table/paragraph each rule extends, matching doc voice (tight, mechanism-first, table for enumerable taxonomy). Placement: U2 -> end of §2 The lifecycle (after the Step/Command table, line 58); U4 -> end of §3 Invariants (after the invariants table, line 84); F6 -> §4 Roles and engines (after Roles/Coordinator paragraph, before 'The bench', line 98). Evidence anchors cited inline exactly as instructed: audit_gen3.md §5.7 + state.json:356/358/352 for U2/U4/F6 respectively; docs/harness-explainer.html §11 for U4's worked example; events.jsonl:585 (verifier-b rotation precedent) and events.jsonl:312-481 (harness-verifier sole-approver of all 9 mdtoc producer tasks T-021..T-029, the monoculture counter-example) for F6. Taxonomy note style used in this very handoff/update: see DECISION:/OPEN-QUESTION: prefixes in the T-040 update note.

VERIFIED (harness-verifier; producer=substrate-worker-2, distinct approver). REPLAYED: git diff --stat ORCHESTRATION.md = +28/-0 pure additions; grep -c OPEN-QUESTION = 2 (>0); three rules at lines 58 (U2)/84 (U4)/98 (F6); all 7 '## N.' headers intact (15,38,71,90,125,136,144), no renumber, no existing table row edited; U2 2-col table well-formed. CONTENT vs audit §5.7: U2 defines DECISION/DEVIATION/TRADEOFF/OPEN-QUESTION + binds audits to chase every OPEN-QUESTION to closure; U4 mandates explainer + exactly 3 comprehension questions before first push/notify, cited in the gate request; F6 forbids single reviewer as sole approver of an epic, requires reviewer distinct from every producer for epic joins + guardrail changes. CITATIONS: events.jsonl:585=verifier-b T-031 done (EXACT); events.jsonl:312-481 spans the harness-verifier-held mdtoc epic (312=T-023 claim..481=T-029 claim, all holder harness-verifier); audit_gen3.md §5.7 (line 298) + §4 row F6 (line 153) exist; docs/harness-explainer.html §11 'Unknowns' exists (nav '11 - Unknowns', section id=unknowns). COHERENCE: F6 does NOT outlaw the §5 tournament pattern -- F6 governs APPROVAL verdicts (sole approver / reviewer-distinct-from-producers at joins+guardrails); the tournament judge is a PRODUCER whose pick is verified downstream (T-027 produced artifacts + verdicted; T-029 join). No contradiction. DISCIPLINE: producer locked ONLY ORCHESTRATION.md (evt 815 acq / 822 rel), artifact update lists ONLY ORCHESTRATION.md, handoff->verifier not self-done. OPEN-QUESTION (non-blocking, gen-4 doc-polish): the paired volatile anchors state.json:352/356/358 no longer dereference in the live file (now P-003 target rows; the gen-3 next_audit_inputs were consumed and the array at :486 holds only a gen-4 seed) -- evidence is NOT falsified/lost: it is recoverable via the STABLE paired anchor audit_gen3.md §5.7 (which itself records those origin lines) and state.json:305 (P-016 summary). Since the replay guardrail targets falsification and none exists, this is a citation-hygiene nit -> future ORCHESTRATION edits should cite stable §-anchors only for mutable files. Minor: F6 prose 'all 9 producer tasks' is loose (T-027 was produced by tournament-judge; T-027/T-029 are verifier tasks) but the sole-approver monoculture point holds. ACCEPT.
